RemediationStrings.Title: MaxSize (Administrative Templates - Event Log Service)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\EventLog\Application\MaxSize must be 32768. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Event Log Service.

RemediationStrings.Title: MaxSize (Administrative Templates - Event Log Service)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\EventLog\Security\MaxSize must be 196608. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Event Log Service.

RemediationStrings.Title: MaxSize (Administrative Templates - Event Log Service)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\EventLog\System\MaxSize must be 32768. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Event Log Service.
